subject: English
chapter: The Case of the Fifth Word

activities_projects.title: Anagram Crossword Challenge
activities_projects.objective: Strengthen vocabulary and analytical thinking through anagram puzzles
steps: Observe the crossword puzzle provided in the chapter
Identify the clues written as anagrams
Rearrange the letters to form meaningful words
Complete the crossword grid and verify answers with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop vocabulary skills and the ability to decode anagrams
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy and completion of crossword puzzle (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Understanding Multiple Meanings of 'Case'
activities_projects.objective: Recognise how a single word can have different meanings in different contexts
steps: Read the sentences given in Column 1
Study the meanings listed in Column 2
Match the correct meaning of the word 'case' in each sentence
Discuss with peers why that meaning fits the sentence
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct matching and explanation of meanings (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Character Study of Encyclopedia Brown
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the qualities and intelligence of the main character
steps: Read the story carefully
List the qualities of Encyclopedia Brown
Find textual evidence that supports each quality
Present your observations in class discussion
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn to support character analysis with textual evidence
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity of analysis and examples used (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Fact and Opinion Identification
activities_projects.objective: Develop critical thinking by distinguishing facts from opinions
steps: Read the statements given in the exercise
Identify which statements are facts and which are opinions
Write your answers with reasons
Discuss differences in interpretation with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve reasoning and analytical skills

activities_projects.title: Code Breaking Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand how clues and coded words help solve mysteries
steps: Examine the coded words 'Nom Utes Sweden Hurts'
Analyse the pattern used to form these words
Identify which days of the week they represent
Find the hidden fifth word and explain how it leads to the solution
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop logical reasoning and decoding skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct explanation of the coded message (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Phrasal Verb Application
activities_projects.objective: Learn and apply phrasal verbs used in the chapter
steps: Identify phrasal verbs used in the lesson
Match each phrasal verb with its meaning
Use the phrasal verbs to fill in the blanks in given sentences
Create two new sentences using any phrasal verb from the list
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve vocabulary usage in context
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct answers and sentence construction (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Word Pair Usage Exercise
activities_projects.objective: Differentiate between commonly confused word pairs
steps: Read the sentences with blanks
Choose the correct word from the given pairs
Write the completed sentences in the notebook
Explain the difference between the two words in each pair
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve spelling, vocabulary, and contextual understanding
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy in selecting correct words (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Mystery Puzzle Interpretation
activities_projects.objective: Enhance observation and reasoning through visual puzzles
steps: Observe the puzzle illustrations carefully
Identify the hidden clues or meanings in the puzzles
Write the phrases or ideas represented by each puzzle
Discuss solutions with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve observation and logical interpretation skills

activities_projects.title: Reported Speech Transformation
activities_projects.objective: Practice converting direct speech into indirect speech
steps: Read the sentences given in direct speech
Identify the reporting verbs and question forms
Convert the sentences into reported speech
Check for correct tense and pronoun changes
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand grammatical rules of reported speech

activities_projects.title: Mystery Story Discussion
activities_projects.objective: Develop communication and critical thinking skills
steps: Form groups of five or six students
Choose a moderator for the discussion
Discuss what makes a mystery story interesting
Present the group's ideas to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students enhance speaking, listening, and collaborative skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Participation and clarity of viewpoints (10 marks)
